name: careeros
description: Agent-native, LaTeX-first CV + Cover-Letter builder with a hybrid learning loop and a job-application pipeline. Works with any AI coding agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, ...).

scripts.jobspy:install: python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -U pip -r requirements.txt
scripts.test: node scripts/parse-cv.mjs --self-test && node scripts/digest.mjs --self-test && node scripts/backup.mjs --self-test && node scripts/contacts.mjs --self-test && node scripts/fetch-jd.mjs --self-test && node lib/skills.mjs --self-test && node scripts/match-score.mjs --self-test && node scripts/board.mjs --self-test && node scripts/seed-examples.mjs --self-test && node scripts/cli.mjs --self-test && node scripts/scan.mjs --self-test && node scripts/compile-latex.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-diff.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-profile.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-retrieve.mjs --self-test && node scripts/style-loop.integration-test.mjs && node scripts/analyze.mjs --self-test && node scripts/followup.mjs --self-test && node scripts/hunt-ingest.mjs --self-test && node scripts/jobspy.mjs --self-test && node scripts/ui-queue.mjs --self-test && node lib/_selftest.mjs
